entry.title: Re: Advance Shipment functionality in Service Order
entry.content:
Hy Sandeep, thanks so much for this information.

One question, exist a scenario for reverse good movment created with the delivery ? for instance VL09 integrated with service order?

Thanks so much

Fernando.

entry.title: Advanced intercompany sales (5D2) Error creating intercompany invoice
entry.content:
Hello,

I am carrying out the configuration guide for the Intercompany 5D2 model, so far I have been able to finish almost all the steps, but with a problem creating the intercompany invoice.

 When trying to create the inercompany IV2 invoice, the system sends me the following error message in the log

 

 

The error mentions point 3.4 of the documentation to define the internal customer number by the sales organization, which is assigned and expanded in the BP transaction for the delivering and selling company sales areas.

Below I show the configuration of the transaction OVVA, to define the internal customer of the sales organization.

Any idea or suggestion on how to solve the problem, I have been trying for days but still without achieving the goal

Greetings and thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Advanced MPL using Elastic Stack
entry.content:
Hi Uwe,

I saw this great post in the past but never gave it a try. I’ve got it working fine now, and it’s a great approach for logging—the best I’ve come across.

I´ve been looking how to make this work with Cloud Connector, but I´m still struggling a bit.
I have added a few lines to your code:

 

String lv_locationId = message.getProperties().get("LOCATION_ID")
CloudConnectorContext context = new CloudConnectorContext()
context.setConnectionType(ConnectionType.HTTP)
CloudConnectorProperties cloudConnectorProperties = ITApiFactory.getService(CloudConnectorProperties.class, context)
def ccport = cloudConnectorProperties.getProxyPort()
def cchost = cloudConnectorProperties.getProxyHost()
Map<String, String> additionalHeaders = cloudConnectorProperties.getAdditionalHeaders()
def bearer = ""
additionalHeaders.each { key, value ->
if (key.toString().equals("Proxy-Authorization"))
bearer = value.toString()
}
.....
template.asyncCallback("ahc:${logstashUrl}?proxyHost=${cchost}&proxyPort=${ccport}", exchange, new Synchronization() {
.....
.withHeader("SAP-Connectivity-SCC-Location_ID", lv_locationId)
.withHeader("Proxy-Authorization", bearer)

 

But It does not work, ahc does not use the proxy 😞

Did you ever tried to make this work with CC? Any hints?

Thanks in advance.

Mikel

entry.title: SAP Product Inspiration Series for Industries & Intelligent CX (Wave #2)
entry.content:
Today I'm extremely proud and excited to announce the second wave of our Product Inspiration Video Series covering the latest innovations of SAP Intelligent CX along with Business AI, Joule, BTP and industry-tailored solutions. 

Here are the latest deep dive videos, hand-crafted with care and dedication exclusively for you... 😉

1. SAP CX AI Toolkit for Sales & Service

Shashank Sanjay from the CX AI Product Management at SAP provides an overview on SAP CX AI Toolkit for Sales & Service. Watch this product inspiration video to learn about the strategic imperatives of SAP CX AI Toolkit for Sales and Service personas as well as our major innovations as part of the Intelligent CX portfolio from SAP.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:39 - Why SAP CX Toolkit for Sales and Service?
00:52 - Which Scenarios are Supported?
01:19 - How can customers adopt SAP CX AI Toolkit for Sales and Service?
05:36 - Start of the Demo
07:14 - Demo: SAP CX AI Toolkit Overview
09:09 - Demo: Embedded AI Tools Overview
09:46 - Demo: Write a Prospecting Email
12:16 - Demo: Generate an Account Summary
13:40 - Demo: Write a Follow-Up Email from a Meeting
15:28 - Demo: SAP Joule in MS Outlook 365
16:23 - Demo: Contact Profile in MS Outlook 365
17:50 - Demo: Smart Actions in MS Outlook 365
19:11 - Demo: Order Details in MS Outlook 365
20:06 - Demo: Write a Case Overview
22:04 - Demo: Write a Customer Service Response
23:21 - Demo: Create a Knowledge Base Article
24:24 - Demo: Create your own GenAI Scenarios with the AI Tools Builder
27:18 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

2. SAP Commerce and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 Extension with SAP BTP Kyma Runtime

Gaurav Abbi from the BTP Kyma Runtime Engineering at SAP provides an overview on the side-by-side extensibility options of SAP Intelligent CX using SAP BTP. Watch this product inspiration video to learn about the strategic imperatives of SAP BTP as extension platform for SAP Commerce Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 as well as our major innovations as part of the Kyma Runtime environment.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:25 - Why is SAP BTP our Preferred Extension Platform?
02:46 - Which Extension Scenarios can be implemented?
03:58 - How do you setup SAP Commerce and Service Cloud V2 along with SAP BTP?
05:22 - Start of the Demo
06:07 - Demo: Positive Product Review in SAP Commerce Cloud
07:30 - Demo: Notification in Slack
08:25 - Demo: Negative Product Review in SAP Commerce Cloud
08:49 - Demo: Notification in Slack
10:10 - Demo: Negative Product Review triggers a Case in SAP Service Cloud V2
11:09 - Demo: Rude Product Review in SAP Commerce Cloud
11:46 - Demo: Notification in Slack
12:32 - Demo: How to Manage Product Reviews in SAP Commerce Cloud
13:22 - Demo: Extension Logic in SAP BTP Kyma Runtime
16:42 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

3. End-to-End Customer Journey in Automotive powered by Intelligent CX from SAP

Sebastian Scharfenberger from the Automotive Industry Business Unit at SAP provides an overview on the end-to-end customer journey powered by SAP Intelligent CX. Watch this product inspiration video to learn about the strategic imperatives of SAP's automotive solutions as well as our major innovations as part of the Intelligent CX portfolio.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:58 - Why does SAP Invest in CX Solutions for the Automotive Industry?
02:43 - What Specific Scenarios do we Support with our SAP Portfolio?
05:29 - How can Automotive Customers Benefit from our CX Solutions?
06:22 - Start of the Demo
07:14 - Demo: SAP CDP with 720 Degree Profile on Customer and Vehicle
09:35 - Demo: SAP Vehicle Management in SAP S/4HANA
10:39 - Demo: Segmentation of Automotive Customers in SAP CDP
11:53 - Demo: Personalized Campaigns in SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement
13:20 - Demo: Customer Receives an Email with a Personalized Offer
13:45 - Demo: Digital Automotive Journey in SAP Commerce Cloud
16:29 - Demo: Get a Trade-In Offer for a Used Car with SAP Recommerce
19:26 - End of the Demo
19:44 - Summary Intelligent CX from SAP

4. Utilities Tactics in SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement

Valentin Minkov from the Emarsys Product Management at SAP provides an overview on pre-packaged customer engagement tactics in SAP Emarsys for Utility and Energy companies. Watch this product inspiration video to learn about the utilities tactics in SAP Emarsys Customer Engagement as well as our latest innovations for this industry.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
00:53 - Why does SAP Invest in Utilities Tactics in SAP Emarsys?
02:49 - What Specific Engagement Tactics do we Offer?
04:34 - How Easy is it for Utilities Customers to Implement SAP Emarsys?
05:28 - Start of the Demo
06:29 - Demo: Welcome Tactic for Utilities in SAP Emarsys
07:30 - Demo: Segmentation in SAP Emarsys
08:18 - Demo: Lookup Consumer Recording in SAP S/4HANA Utilities
08:45 - Demo: Email Editor with Utilities-Specific Personalization Tokens
10:19 - Demo: Create a Custom Token based in SAP S/4HANA IS-U Data
11:45 - Demo: Preview Personalized Campaign in SAP Emarsys
13:53 - Demo: Contract Renewal Tactic for Utilities
15:12 - Demo: Extend Predefined Tactic
16:38 - Demo: Paperless Communication Sign-Up Tactic for Utilities
18:17 - End of Demo
18:33 - Summary Intelligent CX from SAP

5. Case Management in SAP Service Cloud Version 2 Deep Dive

 

Viswa Manapetty and Pavithra N from SAP Product Engineering provide a deep dive into Case Management of SAP Service Cloud Version 2. Watch this product inspiration video to learn about the configuration and fine-tuning steps of SAP Service Cloud Version 2 and hear about latest innovations associated to it.

The key highlights shared in this video are:
00:00 - Introduction
01:11 - What is Case Management in SAP Service Cloud V2?
02:56 - Which capabilities does Case Management support?
04:12 - What are the Benefits for Customers?
05:30 - Start of the Demo
06:11 - Demo: Demo Flow for Case Management
08:00 - Demo: Configure Case Types
09:17 - Demo: Configure Case Flows
10:59 - Demo: Define Input Step Type
11:19 - Demo: Define Autoflow Step Type
12:02 - Demo: Define Assignment Step Type
12:29 - Demo: Case Management in Detail
17:45 - Demo: Email Drafter based on Generative AI
19:44 - Demo: How to Fine-Tune the Case Management UI
21:10 - End of the Demo
21:29 - Summary: Intelligent CX from SAP

 

Curios to learn even more about Industries & Intelligent CX?? Then check out other deep dive videos here:  

Back to the Product Inspiration Overview  |  Check-out the Videos from Wave I

We hope you like them. Enjoy and get inspired about Intelligent CX from SAP.

entry.title: Re: I need to find a demo on content discovery
entry.content:
Hello

Regarding this matter, below I have allocated our official documentation regarding this topic:

Manage Purchase Orders

I hope this helps you.

Best regards,

entry.title: S/4 Hana Cloud Public - Configuring "Value Date Rules for Bank Transactions"
entry.content:
Could someone tell me where to make the configuration via CBC in public cloud to define  "Value Date Rules for Bank Transactions"  ?  The old OBBA  ?

I could not find this line of this configuration 

attached a print of OBBA

entry.title: Re: How to remove sub-report data links from the sdk
entry.content:
Hi Again,

OK there's a few different ways to handle this but first let me clarify what is NOT possible.

I see now what you are attempting to do, sorry I'm retired now so I didn't recognize what you are actually attempting to do...

You cannot modify the SQL in the Report or subreport, CR hasn't be able to do this for quite some time, it used to be able to but it caused all sorts of problems so the function was removed. To many objects to make changes to for complex reports with complex data structures. So what Product did was add the Command Object, basically add your own SQL and then you can edit it as required, as long as it didn't break the report.

And before you ask there is no way to change the data source from tables to a command object, well maybe bit to complex, someone may be able to describe how to, without your data source it's too much to explain.

CR keeps the Data structure embedded in the RPT file so it's not simple to alter, CR hates it when the structure changes, SDK assumes the report info is 100% correct.

So if you look in my test app for

SetData_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)

you can see part of your issue may be multiple Tables in your DataSet, so you may need to adjust your code accordingly. But you won't be able to change the SQL.

Look at this routine also:

DataSet1_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)

And this routine may be of help also:

ReplaceConnection_Click(object sender, EventArgs e)

NOTE: to change any object using RAS you first must Clone() the object collection, delete the existing, then make your change to the cloned collection and the apply the change to the report.

To change the SQL in a Command it's simple, search for "Command" in my test all, you'll see I get it in the may routine, you can then change the SQL, I don't have any examples but it is easy to do, I just don't recall the code...

SO to sum up:

You can't remove the JOIN from the SQL, sorry I should have caught this sooner...

TO be able to you will need to edit the Subreport, In CR Designer you can export the subreport, make the changes to it and then add the subreport back into the main report, NO SDK function to this, must be done in the Report Designer. SDK has no function to export the subreport only.

Now you can copy the SQL in the subreport and set location to a Command and paste in the SQL.

It's not clear though, if your subreport is using a DataSet then CR should not have the JOIN in it's subreport SQL??? If you look at my routine I use standard SQL to populate the DataSet, so this should be what you need to do also.

But since I don't have your report or Dataset I can't be sure exactly what you are doing...

Hope that helps

Don

entry.title: SAP Signavio Customer Meeting in Berlin
entry.content:
Digital transformation projects can be challenging. With competing business priorities, limited budget and a demanding digital culture, many companies require more actionable insights for defining their business case and strategy for transformation.

We would like to give our customers the chance to connect and exchange ideas on this topic during our Customer Community Tour taking place this year. 

Our first stop in Berlin has brought together 17 SAP Signavio customers from the retail, public and transportation sectors, as well as the automotive, manufacturing, services and banking industries. The interactive format offered them the opportunity to discuss case studies and best practices for building a process-driven organization and a streamlined process management approach.  

One of our customers, a public transportation company, gave insights into their approach to using the full SAP Signavio suite to discover, streamline and improve their processes. They have uncovered various new use cases within the organization and highlighted the importance of continuous leadership support and focus on change management during their process transformation journey. 

Another customer and partner, an international consulting company, explained how documenting and publishing processes has helped increase transparency and knowledge sharing across their organization, thus achieving a smoother and more streamlined onboarding of new employees. Their approach to model processes starts with an interview, in which process experts are to explain various process steps. Later, a different employee, who is less familiar with the process, will try to execute the process based on the process model. “Our process model is complete, when the employee can follow the process without needing clarification on process steps”. 

The event also included a workshop on digital innovation and process automation with real-time demos from SAP Labs and enough space to address the actual risks of using AI. Participants provided detailed feedback to our product experts and gained exclusive insights into upcoming features and developments. 

Our tour continues with customer community events in München, Vienna, Hamburg, Frankfurt, Düsseldorf, Zürich and Walldorf throughout the year. 

We would love to welcome you to our community and get to know your story. You can find the steps for joining and contributing to our platform in this article:  

Share your experiences and stories with the SAP Signavio Community 
 
For more content like this, make sure to subscribe to the SAP Signavio @ SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: The ABAP Test Cockpit Checks for SAP TM
entry.content: Hi @lucian_lidy , is downport available by now? I would like to use it on S/4HANA 2021. Cheers, Alej

entry.title: cds view excluding lines with a selection NOT IN another table
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I'm looking for some help / advices on CDS view SQL syntax (I'm not a developer).

I'm trying to fetch datas from PRPS and PRPHI tables (I'm building a CDS view to populate a composite dimension in SAP Analytics cloud.

I'd like my WBS dimension to have a level property field populated from my CDS view

 

select distinct from prps

inner join prhi on prps.pspnr = prhi.posnr

inner join proj on prps.psphi = proj.pspnr

{ key prps.posid as ID, // prhi.posnr has internal format

prps.postu as DESCRIP,

proj.pspid as PARENT, // link to project

'lvl1' as TYPE }

where prhi.up = '00000000'

above "where" is working fine for isolating lvl1 wbs into a subset of data

How could I process to isolate lvl2 WBSs (second line of the screenshot for example) ?

(then I add it to my result set with a union)

Same for lvl3 WBSs ... the condition would be something like PRPS.PSPNR NOT IN (select distinct from prhi {prhi.up}) but it seem the "IN" keyword is not allowed in "CDS SQL"

How would you proceed ? (hope my need is clear)

Thanks in advance.

G.

entry.title: Re: SAP Product Inspiration Series for Industries & Intelligent CX (Wave #2)
entry.content:

One request though... Can you please check video link for videos mentioned in Point 2 as well as Point 5? They are both linked to https://partneredge.sap.com/ which customers don't have access to.

I get the following error when I click either of the following video:

2. SAP Commerce and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 Extension with SAP BTP Kyma Runtime

5. Case Management in SAP Service Cloud Version 2 Deep Dive

 

 

Thanks 
Saurabh

entry.title: Re: Basic Withholding Tax (for customers) Process
entry.content: Thanks @Anthony_Santoro. That section of the help portal is again about withholding tax from suppliers that we pay. @ouma_ronald and I are both looking for information regarding configurations and postings when our customers withhold tax from their payments to us.

entry.title: Re: Watch the SAP BW Modernization Webinar Series
entry.content: @RafkeMagic thanks for letting me know, I've now updated the links in Unit 3-7. Let me know if you experience any access issues.

entry.title: Re: Stateful Fiori / Custom UI5 apps
entry.content:
Hi,

I tried to follow what you have mentioned and it was working fine until I hit one issue with SoftState.

I have implemented SoftState for locking the object in the backend while object is being edited in the SAPUI5 screen.

In general, everything works fine and below are the high level steps.

1. I make get Entity call to retrieve the data of a particular object.
2. In this get Entity Call in the backend, I call ENQUEUE function module to lock the object.

3. On the screen, when user cancel and go out of this edit screen, I call function import to release the object in backend by calling DEQUEUE FM.

 

When we execute above steps very first time in the UI5 application, I observed that ODATA call is being made to backend with different 'sap-context-id' for Get Entity Call and Function Import calls. I believe, that is the culprit to identify the lock part of the same session in the backend and it does not release the lock.

Subsequently, if I edit another object and then come out of the edit screen, both Get Entity call and Function Import call happens with the same 'sap-context-id' and thus releases the lock on the object correctly.

So, now my question is, how can I make sure first call happening for Get Entity and Function Import goes through the same 'sap-context-id' so that ENQUEUE & DEQUEUE happens for the object in the same session recognizing the own lock and not the foreign lock?

 I had followed below blog to implement softstate successfully in my ODATA and SAPUI5 application except above issue.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-use-soft-state-support-for-odata-services/ba-p/13259227

@maheshpalavalli & @former_member184739 : Please provide your valuable inputs in this regard.


Thank you,

Bhavik

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 3 - Image Embed
entry.content:
Lola is actually a British shorthair. Ah well, nobody's perfect, right? 😜

Enjoyed the bug-hunting! 😁

Hi @Anna-Maria - I have subscribed to SAP Build code from the BTP trail account following the steps  in the link https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-code-setup.html. But, I am getting following error message in the BAS application.

Really appreciate if you could let me know the reason for this error. 

Thanks,

Sujith

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Scripts Recorder not available anymore - What...
entry.content: @stefan_schnell: Thank you very much for your answer. That was my expectation, unfortunately. The administration decided to block the recording but still allow for playing scripts for the moment. Apparently, security issues which seems un-logical assuming that playing would be considered the dangerous action. Any good arguments why to block this?

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI equivalent to VB.NET session.EndTransaction o...
entry.content:
@stefan_schnell: Thanks for helping. I believe I have now understood a bit more how we can do some of these steps. Not easy without the recorder but still possible with VBA and Excel. Contrary to VS (VB.NET or C#) you can directly connect to SAP and see all methods and properties of the library using the reference SAP GUI Scripting API. While debugging, you can add watches and check the types and contents of the objects. Really helpful. When in VS (using SAPFEWSELib), expanding the objects on debugging does not give us any information. The Dynamic View comes up with an Error  -> Cannot evaluate expression since the function evaluation requires all threads to run. Is this how it should be? Am I missing something? 

By the way, without using your Tracker.exe, I would be blocked. Thank you for developing and share it to everyone.

entry.title: Re: Useful documents for Schema & PCR configuration
entry.content:
Links for common operations and functions using in Payroll schema and Time schema. Please download zip file and then open offline. Thanks.

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1t7ITygH_qQBjFTzHOC0Uy_CI6ASWhbi_?usp=drive_link

entry.title: Re: How the SAP system calculates the Target Quantity for production Order?
entry.content: He is asking about production order total target quantity not planned order quantity.

entry.title: Re: Consuming SAP with SAP Build Apps - Web App in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
entry.content:
Hello  @LudoNoens,

Thanks for this great post, I encountered two issues.

1) When I navigate to Build Apps, the deployed mtar application does not appear, preventing me from adding it to the site.

2) I was receiving an "Internal Server Error" when opening the application from either the generated link or the BTP cockpit. By following the steps listed above, enabling "Identity Authentication" in the Build Work Zone, the error stopped. However, we are experiencing a different behavior. In the past, I set up the trust with SuccessFactors in SAP BTP and enabled the "Available for User Logon" option. When I accessed Build Apps, I had the choice to log in with either IAS or SuccessFactors, and both options worked. However, after activating Identity Authentication in Build Work Zone, it now prompts me to log in with IAS, even though I'm already logged in with SuccessFactors SSO. I tried disabling the "Available for User Logon" option in IAS, but it still requests that I log in with IAS. I also tried clearing the browser cache and using a different browser, but the issue persists.

Could you help me understand how we can go back to connecting SF SSO into Build Apps without this additional IAS prompt to access to the HTML5 Application?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How the SAP system calculates the Target Quantity for production Order?
entry.content: Not true. He is asking about Production Order Total Target Quantity not the desired Total quantity which is entered when production order is created

entry.title: Re: SAP Trial installation stalling on unbuntu
entry.content: Hi sorry it took me so long to get back to you but yes, the space on the VM was the issue. i upped it to around 400GB and everything worked fine. thank you 🙂

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

Thx for your reply above . I checked that the private message is turned on 

My Settings -> Preferences ->Private messenger ->Turn on private messages ( enabled)

I also sent you a private message which you can reply to send the activation link otherwise my email id is sohani.ashu@gmail.com

Many thx

Ash

entry.title: Re: C# Script SAP GUI Select text and hit copy button
entry.content:
@stefan_schnell: Thank you for the hint on how to select the text on such object. If we don't know how many chars we have, is 1024 the max? 

I have also used the GetProperty(editBoxID, "text") to get the contents without having to have any text selected.

I have tried both solutions and both work.

entry.title: MARA Table missing from Developer Edition
entry.content: Recently i downloaded the Developer 7.52 SP04 version of SAP. I am trying to complete some of the modules on the training website and other tutorials and i am coming across missing items. For example, the latest tutorial is showing me how to pull materials from the MARA table. However i noticed i am missing this table. is there a way to import testing data to fill these common tables so i can move forward with my ABAP learning? i am trying to get certified asap.

entry.title: Re: Product allocation API
entry.content: Use GET call to read GUID of Product Allocation Object and also CVC GUID (if already exists).

entry.title: Re: Is it still possible to generate add-on ARD?
entry.content:
Hi,

This isnt really an answer, but why do you need to generate using the ARD.

Light Weight deployment is much easier to manage. I would recommend this over the traditional ARD build process.

Regards

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Planning Area extension for SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @david_ings , dynamic planning area support for data action is on the roadmap: 

https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?BC=6EAE8B27FCC11ED892E91C2A1DFA40CC&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=AFE6F69D0A8E1EEEBCC1AB0BCF8A3ABE 

Regards,

Sarau

entry.title: Re: Is it still possible to generate add-on ARD?
entry.content:
Hi, @brendanbell!

Thanks for your answer! I know and i agree that generate LW version is better than ARD.

I'm just confused about what is the function of the AddOnRegDataGen.exe. At the SDK's folder, there are Extension Package (to generate the LW zip) and the AddOnRegDataGen.

entry.title: Custom webservice call from SAP CC
entry.content:
Dear Folks

I have a business requirement to pull the customer consumption data or usage data from a product system, determine the $ amount and generate the report back to the product system.

We are having S/4HANA and CC 2023 system and does not have Convergent Mediation in our landscape

Can this requirement be handled via custom webservice call from SAP CC directly? If Yes, Please help the process/steps how this reqirement can be handles.

Really appriciate your support. Thanks in Advance.

@francois_thimon 

 

-Anil

entry.title: Re: Product Reference for Packaging Specification
entry.content:
Hello Dear Reader,

As per my understanding, the standard SAP condition table SAPIBD01 does not has the Reference Product (PAK_REFMATID), so a new table having this field is used. Please can you correct me if I am wrong.

Thanking You

Yogesh Agarwal.

entry.title: Why do we need Allowance concept ?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

As per my understanding, Allowance is needed to give credit points to customer which customer can use to consume before it starts getting charged. Example free 15 minutes in calls for new contract.

I was able to achieve this solution just using persistent counter, without using allowance. So my question is what does allowance provides extra?

entry.title: The automatic creation of the asset master data during goods receipt is still possible
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, I'm looking for the functionality to create fixed assets in the Manage Purcharse Orders app (or advanced) and the regular option to set up the asset class and accounting data inside the PO to perform the asset number asignment process after the PO creation, during the post goods receipt.

is it possible with Public Edition?

entry.title: Re: solman_setup - unable to execute activity Database Ex...
entry.content: Dear Customer, in order to address the issue, it is necessary to perform a check on the solman system. To initiate this process, kindly create a case on SV-SMG-INF-CFG-MNG.

entry.title: Re: Is it still possible to generate add-on ARD?
entry.content: dont recall using this. But I only started with B1 v9x. COuld be legacy tool

entry.title: SAP Community Voice: June 19, 2024, Edition
entry.content:
As announced in the June 5 and May 22 editions of SAP Community Voice, we phased out the email version of the newsletter -- with the very last edition going out on June 19. 

This post includes the highlights from that June 19 edition, and moving forward, the newsletter will live on here in What's New, delivering the hottest content and latest announcements from the SAP Community site.

By subscribing to What's New via the Options menu on that page -- and setting your notification settings to your liking -- you'll still be able to receive the community news, highlights, and other content highlighted in the SAP Community Voice newsletter. You'll also be able to leave kudos and comment on these posts, and your feedback will help us improve.

So while the email version of SAP Community Voice may have come to an end, the newsletter isn't saying goodbye. Instead, we're saying that we hope to see you in the What's New section!

 

Featured Content

 

SAP Sapphire 2024 Highlights About UX, Application Development, and AI

If you're looking for a personal perspective about SAP Sapphire from a member who also happens to be part of the SAP Cloud ERP UX Engineering team, give this post a read. It focuses on UX strategy, SAP Fiori, and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, but also covers AI and other key topics. 

Read the blog post

 

Blog One: Integration Between SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud

The first entry in a five-part series about integrating SAP Datasphere with SAP Analytics Cloud for data harmony, this post provides an overview of SAP Analytics Cloud, explores its advantages, and offers guidance for setting up the data connection for optimal functionality. 

Read the blog post

 

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA: Trial Systems for Private Cloud and On-Prem

SAP S/4HANA trial systems from SAP Cloud Appliance Library come complete with sample data, test users, and demo guides to get you started. This post shows you how to obtain, use, and extend your trial system, as well as explains what you get with the latest trial systems. 

Read the blog post

 

Our Way into the Clean Core: The Journey of an SAP Software Partner

Clean core remains a hot topic of conversation, and this blog post (from an SAP Community member from a long-standing software partner of SAP) shares the author's experiences (good and bad) with participating in a pilot project for clean-core development on private cloud systems. 

Read the blog post

 

Community News

 

Don't Forget to Subscribe to What's New (and Check Out Our Resources) 

Per the introduction, we may have sent out our last email newsletter…but this isn't the end for SAP Community Voice. What's New is our new home, and from that page, you can locate the Options menu, then select subscribe to keep up on the latest community news and popular content. You can also learn more about SAP Community through our help section, how-to videos, and Tour the SAP Community 2024 tutorial.

 

Find Fun, Educational Events Closer to Home in Our Locations Groups! 

Our events section includes SAP CodeJam, SAP Inside Track, and SAP Community meetups, as well as other online and in-person events, but did you know that several of our location groups have event boards promoting their own local events? For example, São Paulo has an SAP Inside Track scheduled for July 27, and Lingen has a meetup on August 15.

 

Hoodies, Shirts, and Pins -- Oh My! See What's in Our Online Store…

Our supplies seem to be flying off the virtual shelves at the SAP Community online store. We guess that many of you have been paying attention to this promotion and decided to invest in SAP Community gear. Thank you! If you haven't gone shopping in our online store, don't get left out. We still have hoodies, a variety of shirts, and pins. Get yours today and wear your love for SAP Community!

entry.title: Re: Showing SAP Companion Help Guided Tour on SAP Fiori S...
entry.content:
Hi Angad,

In principle, the two screen context IDs should be captured against the overall GT and the relevant context ID against each step of the GT.  Have you created a step on every screen in the transaction?  If you have no steps on a screen in the transaction, the GT will not appear for that screen.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Showing SAP Companion Help Guided Tour on SAP Fiori S...
entry.content: Hello Shane, thank you for the response. When we created a GT on the first screen of the Fiori app, the GT showed a specific context or screen ID. Now, from that first screen of the Fiori app, when I navigate to the next screen, the same GT does not appear on the Help panel. In that case, when I create a new GT on the next screen of the Fiori app, that GT shows a different context ID. So, my guess is that if each screen in the Fiori app is having different screen ID, we will not see the same GT on all screens. Any thoughts on this?

entry.title: What are the steps to follow S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC to create a new ODATA with post method for TRM?
entry.content: What are the steps to follow in S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC to create a new ODATA with post method (for the creation of financial operations in TRM of money market) to create a Product Type 54A / 55a), and also that it is possible generate update?

entry.title: Business Integration Builder : Passing custom fields
entry.content:
Hi All,

Existing implementation of custom BADI (ZHR_SFEC_ADAPT_ORG_ASSIGNMENT / BADI Definition EX_SFIOM_ADAPT_EE_ORG_ASSGNMNT) shows set of custom fields being passed from SF to ECC.

Structure used to pass fields(all are custom fields) from SF to ECC is ORGAS_CUSTFEXT but I am not able to figure out where are the definition/grouping defined for these custom fields (Standard Tables under ORGAS_CUSTFEXT).

Another way of looking into the issue is I can see only few custom fields in table SFIOM_RPRQ_EOAXT. Where is this grouping of fields defined? 

(I have tried searching in SPRO > BIB configuration but I am not able to figure that out. Custom org fields are retrieved but based on what grouping/definition).

Please suggest.

Best Regards,

Naveen Vishal

entry.title: SAP DM - How to lock an order
entry.content:
Dear all experts,

Is there any way to release an order which I don't want operator to start yet?

This is because I don't want operaters to start an SFC in patriculer material, but an order would be integrated from S/4.

Regards,

Koichi Okamoto

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check if telnet originating from Production to Development works fine. It is possible that bi-directional connectivity is not enabled on the Firewalls. If the telnet from Production to Development works, I would suggest looking at the firewall logs (when testing the RFC) to check if it is not blocking the RFC call.

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Re: Is it still possible to generate add-on ARD?
entry.content:
No problem!

Do you still use the AddOnRegDataGen tool nowadays?

When I generate LW, i use only the ExtensionPackage. But let me know if you do something diferent.

 

I appreciate your help

entry.title: Re: No active outbound service for appl. obj. 50000000262...
entry.content:
Hi @Enda ! Thankyou for the feedback and answer. We have tried to add new communication arrangement, communication system and output determination but we still got the error. Hereby attached the screenshot of the settings.

Is there any missing for the configuration?

Thankyou!

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello Kishan,

entry.title: Re: Server startup failed for promotion extension
entry.content:
You have to explicitly use the new promotion module. Include this into your localextensions.xml:

<extension name='droolsruleengineservices'/>
<extension name='rulebuilderbackoffice'/>
<extension name="promotionengineservices" />
<extension name="promotionenginebackoffice" />
<extension name="promotionenginesamplesaddon" />
<extension name="couponbackoffice" />
<extension name="couponfacades" />
<extension name="couponservices" />
<extension name="couponwebservices" />
<extension name='couponbackoffice'/>

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello Kishna

entry.title: Re: SAP business Objects following upgrade, unable to login
entry.content:
Hello,

Looking at the described behavior this might be a case of Tomcat hanging when trying to get the service to discover available CMS to process the logon. I might suggest trying login bypassing the ALB and using direct Tomcat URL - if already tried, let us know if this works. 

If the same behavior is seen via ALB or direct Tomcat URL, further investigation of traces is required as per SAP Note 3042966. The gathered thread dumps can provide more information on the issue cause.

I would also suggest checking SAP Note 2468820 and related notes - to ensure firewall rules across the cluster nodes do not cause login issues.

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Digital Manufacturing Results Cancelled
entry.content:
Is there a cancellation process in Digital Manufacturing that reverts back to previous steps for SFCs that have been processed by WorkCenter POD or Operation POD?

And I was wondering if there is a DM API that cancels the performance.

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello Kishan Telnet connection to the gateway port between Production and Development is working fine. Are you suggesting that we should examine only the firewall logs to understand why it is being blocked?

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content:
Hello,

There can be multiple reasons causing this issue and firewall block can be one of those. Does your Production system have multiple application servers and cluster setup for message server? Has the RFC been configured to call the correct message server hostname/port and server group? Have you tried the RFC by connecting to specific production application server and bypassing the message server?

If these are correctly verified, I would then suggest checking SAP Notes and links below:

500235 - Network Diagnosis with NIPING - SAP for Me

2507582 - 10054: WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer - SAP for Me

ISSUE #2: Partner … not reached | SAP Help Portal

These suggest further checks to be performed. TCP/IP flow dumps and firewall connectivity logs need to be checked if everything from SAP application perspective has been checked/verified. Hope this helps.

Regards,

Kishan

entry.title: Re: Exchange rate at Project builder
entry.content: Dear Marcio, thanks for your reply. We use controlling currency and company currency is different, because we have multiple company code. If there is no fixed exchange rate, that we will have exchange rate fluctuation, but now your answer is clear. Thanks a lot.

entry.title: API or CDS for Manage Posting Periods
entry.content:
We are going to post journal entries from an external system to S/4HANA Cloud public edition.
I would like to check whether the posting date specified in the external system is within the open range set in Manage Posting Periods app.
However, I cannot find a standard API or CDS view to export information about open periods set in SAP.
Please let me know if there is anything relevant.

entry.title: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availability for SAP Business One
entry.content:
Hello experts,

Referring to the file below, I'm in the middle of preparing for setting up a HA environment now.
File name : Setting_Up_SAP_HANA_Database_High_Availability_for_SAP_Business_One_10.0_for_Automatic_Failover.pdf

Please refer to the image below.

Wondering if it is possible to install SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 as central server OS instead of SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application.

FYI, to give you more clarity on versions, here is the list of 4 types which can exist based on the above.
(1) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2 for SAP Application
(2) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP2
(3) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4 for SAP Application
(4) SUSE Linux Enterprise 15 SP4

Looking forward to your reply.
Thanks in advance. 🙂

Bests,
Wonuk Jeon

entry.title: Re: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availabili...
entry.content:
Hello Wonuk,

Based on the information you provided and SAP Note 2235581, I would strongly recommend going for the SLES for SAP Application. Benefits of using the SAP specific flavor is due to additional features and extended support cycles.

Regarding SLES 15 version, in general both SP2 and SP4 versions are supported but there are dependencies on corresponding HANA versions supported and Business One requirements. You would need check and corelate all these to come to a decision. I would recommend going to newer SP version if all dependencies are satisfied.

Regards, Kishan

entry.title: Реферальний код Kucoin: rMN4U8Y — найкращий вітальний бонус у 2024 році
entry.content:
Реферальний код Kucoin: rMN4U8Y — найкращий вітальний бонус у 2024 році

Реферальний код Kucoin на 2024 рік — «rMN4U8Y». Скористайтеся цим кодом, щоб отримати знижку 40% на комісії за торгівлю та ексклюзивну винагороду в розмірі 700 доларів США для нових користувачів. Ви також можете заробити до 40% комісії з торгових зборів своїх друзів, запросивши їх приєднатися до KuCoin.

Найкращий реферальний код Kucoin 2024

Найкращий реферальний код KuCoin на 2024 рік — «rMN4U8Y». Зареєструйтесь із цим кодом, щоб отримати 40% кешбеку від комісій за торгівлю. KuCoin підтримує понад 700 криптовалют, включаючи Bitcoin та Ethereum, і забезпечує безпечне торгове середовище з низькими комісіями.

Як використовувати реферальний код KuCoin: rMN4U8Y

Відвідайте офіційний сайт KuCoin.

Натисніть «Зареєструватися» у верхньому правому куті.

Введіть адресу електронної пошти та створіть пароль.

Введіть реферальний код "rMN4U8Y" у полі "Реферальний код (необов'язково)".

Завершіть процес реєстрації.

Переваги реферальної програми KuCoin

1. **Бонус за рекомендацію**: отримуйте бонус на комісію за торгівлю, використовуючи код реферала «rMN4U8Y».
2. **Заробіток за весь період**: постійно заробляйте відсоток від торгових комісій ваших рефералів.
3. **Рівнева комісія**: збільшуйте ставку комісії, запрошуючи більше користувачів.

Пошук реферального коду KuCoin у додатку

1. Відкрийте програму KuCoin.
2. Перейдіть до розділу «Запросити друзів», щоб знайти свій реферальний код.
3. Поділіться своїм кодом, щоб отримати комісійні від торгової діяльності ваших друзів.

Поширені запитання про реферальний код Kucoin

- **Реферальний код Kucoin**: код «rMN4U8Y».
- **Найкращий реферальний код Kucoin 2024**: найкращий код — rMN4U8Y.
- **Використання існуючого облікового запису**: реферальний код призначений лише для нових реєстрацій.
- **Бонусна програма KuCoin**: нові користувачі можуть отримати до 700 доларів США, використовуючи код реферала «rMN4U8Y» під час реєстрації.

entry.title: Re: solr server is not started along with hybris server v...
entry.content:
Make sure you include "solrserver" into your localextensions.xml:

<extension name="solrserver" />

Registreer u met deze code en profiteer van 40% cashback op handelskosten. Bezoek de officiële website van KuCoin. 2. Klik op 'Aanmelden' in de rechterbovenhoek. 3. Voer uw e-mailadres in en maak een wachtwoord aan. 4. entry.title: Re: Integrating AI with SAPUI5 Fiori Apps: Part 3 - Building an AI Chatbot Assistant
entry.content: @Cocquerel I focussed this blog series for frontend developers, to integrate SAPUI5 apps (Freestyle/Fiori Elements) directly with LLMs without a dedicated 'application backend' (i.e. CAP or other backends) like in a full-stack app. In the subsequent blogs, I'm planning on writing about RAG with/without CAP LLM Plugin.

Fiori ID F0744A

Kind regards

entry.content: 👍

entry.title: Total Commitment Cost should not reduce after booking of actual expenditure in CN41N
entry.content:
How can I stop column "Total commitment Cost" in report CN41N to reduce after booking of actual through GR / SES in Project System.

I want that "Total Commitment Cost" column should be same even after booking of actual expenditure through SES or GR.

Thanks and Regards

entry.title: Re: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to se...
entry.content:
As mentioned in previous responses, the only way to get more detailed moving average price data is to increase the pricing unit.

The moving average price has no bearing on the value of your inventory so you do not need to justify the rounding differences to an auditor.  It is simply the value that will be used to value future goods issue transactions.

If you posted a goods issue for your 329 pieces of inventory I think you are correct and the transaction would be valued at 10,093.72 with a variance account posting for 0.69 (depending on your account determination setup).  That is where the discrepancy is accounted for.  You will not find the additional decimal places you are looking for in the moving average price.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - How to lock an order
entry.content: As default we already use a 2 stage release process. First you release the order in ERP which then integrates it to SAP DM, then when you are ready to start work you carry out the 2nd release In SAP DM which releases it to the shop floor ready for the operators to start work on it.

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello Kishan , Please find my answer Does your Production system have multiple application servers and cluster setup for message server? The Production system does not have a cluster or any application server. Has the RFC been configured to call the correct message server hostname/port and server group? Yes Have you tried the RFC by connecting to specific production application server and bypassing the message server? Production system is a single system and does not have any application server

entry.title: Re: Call for Speakers: SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 2024 – Business AI Edition
entry.content: @shiva_kotha, you nominate your session using the above link, and our content team will review it accordingly. If it fits with the strategy, you will hear from us.

entry.title: Re: How to update Calculated Measure based on Page or Inp...
entry.content:
Hi Vasu_Sac, 

  Starting from 2024 QRC3( wave 2024.10), descriptions will be supported for story calculation, so you can have same text for two calculations on two pages. 

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-in-sap-analytics-cloud-release-2024-10/ba-p/13703898?emcs_t=S2h8ZW1haWx8ZGlnZXN0X25vdGlmaWNhdGlvbnxMV0E0U083UUFYTkZPMHwtMXxPVEhFUlN8aEs

Best regards, William

entry.title: INVENTORY TURN
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I need to see the inventory turn report and is there any t-code for that ?

I was asked to get the list of slow moving inventory list and I currently have no idea where to look at..

for example, say item 'A' is in the storage and I wanna see the very first posting that of that item 'A' and all the movement since then...or to see the list of items that have no movement but is in the palnt.

I know i can check individual item in MB51 but this one doesn't give you the first posting date and too detailed.

So I need a report that can generate the first posting date and movement since then to see what items are not moving..

FYI below is the version I am using now.

entry.title: Re: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to se...
entry.content: Thank you Robyn. Would you say then that this statement is misleading? The Total Inventory Value = Moving Average Price x Quantity on Hand? Would it be more accurate to say, Moving Average Price = Total Inventory Value / Quantity on Hand?

I would love to apply for the Learning initiative as I believe this is a fabulous opportunity as a women.

I look forward to hearing from you

 

Eva

entry.title: Re: Audit question - Moving Average Unit Cost - How to se...
entry.content: Adding to reply to Robyn... also of course, then the MAC be displayed as 2 decimals and can be easily explained as rounding. versus the other way around where it is not.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - How to lock an order
entry.content:
Thank you for answering my question.

I have another question about SFC auto-release setting.

(https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/enabling-auto-release-of-production-and-process-orders?locale=en-US)

Is it possible to switch auto-release setting depending on material?

entry.title: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
Hi All

Is this Query limitation cannot have DocEntry hyper link to drill into posted transactions in this customized Query?

 

SELECT

T8.DocEntry, T8.DocNum,
T2.DocNum,
T7a.[U_AF_MAJORGRP], T7a.[U_AF_OVERGRP],
T7b.ItmsGrpNam,
T7.ItemCode, T7.Dscription,
T7.Quantity, T7a.InvntryUom, T8.DocDate, T8.DocDueDate,
T8.CardCode, T8.CardName, T7.Price

 

--T6.DocNum,
--T10.DocNum

FROM POR1 T1
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPOR T2
ON T1.DocEntry = T2.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PDN1 T3
ON T2.DocEntry = T3.BaseEntry
AND T1.LineNum = T3.BaseLine
AND T1.ItemCode = T3.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPDN T4 ON T3.DocEntry = T4.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPD1 T5 ON T4.DocEntry = T5.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T5.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T5.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPD T6 ON T5.DocEntry = T6.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN PCH1 T7 ON T4.DocEntry = T7.BaseEntry AND T3.LineNum = T7.BaseLine AND T3.ItemCode = T7.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN OPCH T8 ON T7.DocEntry = T8.DocEntry
LEFT OUTER JOIN OITM T7a ON T7.[ItemCode] = T7a.[ItemCode]
INNER JOIN OITB T7b ON T7a.[ItmsGrpCod] = T7b.[ItmsGrpCod]
LEFT OUTER JOIN RPC1 T9 ON T8.DocEntry = T9.BaseEntry AND T7.LineNum = T9.BaseLine AND T7.ItemCode = T9.ItemCode
LEFT OUTER JOIN ORPC T10 ON T9.DocEntry = T10.DocEntry

WHERE
T8.[DocDate] >=[%0] and T8.[DocDate] <=[%1]
ORDER BY

--T2.DocNum,
--T1.LineNum,
--T4.DocNum,
--T3.LineNum,
--T6.DocNum,
--T5.LineNum,
T8.DocNum
--T7.LineNum,
--T10.DocNum,
--T9.LineNum

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: Generate JWT Token from CPI
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have scenario like external system => CPI by using jwt token. As i know, we can build connection from CPI to external system by using JWT token. Can we build reverse direction as well?

Can JWT token supports both directions with CPI ?

Vasu

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content: I am so excited to be part of this community. I am eager to learn about SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0 and SAP Datasphere. It would be nice if anyone can share resources on the same.

entry.title: Re: RFC between Production and development is not working
entry.content: Hello, In this case I would request you to run the niping tests as well as per SAP Note 500235. If there are no issues shown in the niping tests, you would need to check firewall/TCP trace/logs. Also please raise an incident to BC-MID-RFC for further investigation. Thanks, Kishan

entry.title: Re: MARA Table missing from Developer Edition
entry.content:
Hi Brian,

OnPrem Developer Edition is just the "Netweaver ABAP" - it contains only the technical foundation for the business systems.

Table MARA (Material Master or Product) is not part of the technical foundation. 'MARA' is delivered by the ERP solutions like ECC6.0 or S/4HANA.

For training regarding table MARA, you'll need a training system with ERP. As far as i know such a system is not available as a developer edition.

Best Regards

Eric

entry.title: FMS Item Code from OITM UDF in Sales Quotation
entry.content:
Hi All

I managed to write this FMS Query to auto Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0] and able to search Item Number after typing BT Catalogue UDF but once I TAB to next field BT Catalogue UDF value disappeared.  Please advise is there any step I missed out or is this a FMS limitation search on Item Master Data UDF in Sales Quotation?

 

Select T0.ItemCode from OITM where T0.U_A_CatNo =$[$38.U_A_CatNo.0]

 

 

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: Group Reporting - Import Validation Settings
entry.content: The excel is basically extraction of involved database tables and fields with technical field names shown, which is not comprehensible by regular users. It's not intended for users to create rules in the excel..

entry.title: Re: INVENTORY TURN
entry.content:
Hi, if you want to see when PGR or any other mat doc was posted, mentioned MB51 is fine. If you need to see movement within storage bins the LT23 (or WT if EWM) overview should be enough - you can see any single movement between storage bins and also you can deduct the PGR date from here

 

Standa

entry.title: Re: SAP REPORT QUERY
entry.content: Post by Mistek

entry.title: Re: SAP Product Inspiration Series for Industries & Intelligent CX (Wave #2)
entry.content: Hi  @Saurabh_Kabra , so glad to hear your positive feedback. Really appreciated! Indeed we focus on in-depth system demos instead of walking through a bunch of slides... 😉  Now the links should work fine again. Also thanks for letting me know.

entry.title: Re: Consuming SAP with SAP Build Apps - Web App in SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition
entry.content:
Hi @JoaquinD ,

To answer you first question, the deployed app should be visible in the list of HTML5 Applications, accessible through the BTP Cockpit (see my last screenshot in the blog post). It is not clear to me where you are navigating to in SAP Build Apps. The MTA file built using the build service in SAP Build Apps can still be found in the UI of the build service. 

As you need to select a BTP end point, Cloud Foundry organisation and space, you might have deployed your app into another space.

Regards,
Ludo

entry.title: Nadchodzące spotkania SAP Community - czerwiec/lipiec 2024
entry.content:
Cześć 🙂

to już jutro widzimy się na następnym SAP Stammtisch - luźnym spotkaniu przy piwie grupy SAPowej z Katowic i okolic: katowice-sap-stammtisch-26-06-2024

Tym razem w zielonym otoczeniu, więc nie może Cię zabraknąć 🙂 Zapowiada się ciepło i słonecznie, więc na pewno zadbamy o nawodnienie naszych organizmów 😉 Dajcie znać jeżeli się wybieracie pod postem wydarzenia (link wyżej), by tym zachęcić niezdecydowanych do przyjścia 😉 

Z innych wydarzeń, dziejących się po sąsiedzku - @Vitaliy-R organizuje SIT we Wrocławiu, który odbędzie się już 6 lipca. Zapisy przez formularz: SIT Wroc a więcej na ten temat przeczytacie w poście: sap-inside-track-wroclaw-2024 

Do zobaczenia!

entry.title: Re: MARA Table missing from Developer Edition
entry.content: You can rent a fully functional S/4 HANA ERP system on cal.sap.com and pay as you use; but it would be a time limited demo system - so it's not supposed to be used forever.

entry.title: Kucoin verwijzingscode: "QBSQAXS7" - Exclusieve beloning van $ 700 USDT voor nieuwe gebruikers
entry.content:
**Hoe u de KuCoin-verwijzingscode gebruikt: "QBSQAXS7"** 1. Bezoek de officiële website van KuCoin. 2. Klik op 'Aanmelden' in de rechterbovenhoek. 3. Voer uw e-mailadres in en maak een wachtwoord aan. 4. Voer de verwijzingscode "QBSQAXS7" in het veld "Verwijzingscode (optioneel)" in. 5. Voltooi het registratieproces.

De Kucoin-verwijzingscode voor 2024 is "QBSQAXS7". Gebruik deze code om 40% korting te krijgen op handelskosten en een exclusieve beloning van $ 700 USDT voor nieuwe gebruikers. Verdien tot 40% commissie op de handelskosten van uw vrienden door hen uit te nodigen om lid te worden van KuCoin.

De beste KuCoin-verwijzingscode voor 2024 is "QBSQAXS7". Registreer u met deze code en profiteer van 40% cashback op handelskosten. KuCoin ondersteunt meer dan 700 cryptocurrencies, waaronder Bitcoin en Ethereum, en biedt een veilige handelsomgeving tegen lage kosten.

entry.title: Re: Navigation to Detail Page does not work using FPM & U...
entry.content:
I usually use this code to access the router (router is initialized in Component):

const oRouter = this.getOwnerComponent().getRouter();

I also see duplicate id's in your console. You should remove that also, the app won't work otherwise.

Regards,

Noël

entry.title: Re: Different WPT determination for Inbound delivery
entry.content: True sir

entry.title: Angel One Referral Code -"BZ15881VQW":- Best Gift 2024
entry.content: Angel One's Refer & Earn program rewards users for referring friends and family to join Angel One. The referral process is as follows: "BZ15881VQW":- Best Bonus Gift Refer a friend to Angel One "BZ15881VQW" The friend opens an account and trades with Angel One within 30 days The referrer receives a reward

entry.title: How to Secure Endpoints in SAP BTP AND User Authentication
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I am currently working on securing the endpoints in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) and would appreciate some guidance on best practices and available methods for implementing robust security measures, particularly focusing on user authentication.


Thanks 
Rituraj Kumar

entry.title: When the field in the RCM offer letter template is set to 'yes', the portlet would be visible in EC
entry.content:
Hi Community,

If the fields 'Travel Allowance Remarks', 'Relocation Expenses', and 'Notice Buyback Remarks' in the RCM Offer Letter template are set to 'yes', the Reimbursement portlet should be visible in Employee Central for the respective employees.

Please let us know the feasibility.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: INVENTORY TURN
entry.content:
Hello @khwa11 

MC46 - Slow-Moving Items

MC44 - Inventory Turnover

SAP menu path: Information Systems -> Logistics -> Inventory management -> Material -> Document Evaluations:

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: ODataModel not getting called when adding authorizati...
entry.content:
Thanks to a discussion on GitHub I've narrowed it down a bit more. 

If I use curl I can see that calls directly to the destination and localhost works

curl -I --header "Authorization: Bearer <token>" https://successfactors.dest/odata/v2/$metadata
curl -I --header "Authorization: Bearer <token>" https://localhost:8080/odata/v2/$metadata

However calls to the BAS proxy does not work
curl -I --header "Authorization: Bearer <token>" https://port8080-workspaces-xxxxxxx.eu20.applicationstudio.cloud.sap/odata/v2/$metadata

This calls again gives me 401 and never shows up in backend-proxy-middleware

entry.title: Re: DocEntry hyper link not working
entry.content:
Hi,

you can't mix up different DocTypes

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: MARA Table missing from Developer Edition
entry.content: As eric says: it´s a Netweaver system not an ERP system. So if you are going to learn ABAP find the learning material that i.ex. uses the tables SCARR, SPFLI and SFLIGHT. Theese are used in the Demo Flight Company that should be in all Netweaver systems

entry.title: Re: Check requirements to set up SAP HANA High Availabili...
entry.content:
Hello,

 

SLES for SAP Application is mandatory for automatic failover solution. 

To determine SLES15 SP version, you should refer to the SAP Business One Administrator's guide or overview note for the specific SAP Business One patch version. for example, if you intend to use SAP Business One 10.0 FP 2405, the supported SLES version is 15 SP3, SP4 and SP5.

 

the excerpts from 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_ONE_ADMIN_GUIDE_HANA/1a2fc202f7f64336abf9fbc957d9b9ba/13c43452877d4feaad4dbd661d15d9bb.html?version=10.0_SP_2405
